captain_logic: Haaland is benched (Pep World Cup rest) and scores 0, so the default premium armband is off the table. Salah is the APEX-proven captaincy signal: season cum_pts leader (232 pts), confirmed starting for champions Liverpool, elite xGI 0.86/90 on penalties. GW38 is use-it-or-lose-it, so Triple Captain is deployed on Salah (no future value, no DGW to save for) — strictly +EV vs letting the chip expire (~13.5 captained, ~20.3 tripled). Bowen is VC as injury-independent backup: nailed starter in the WHU-vs-Leeds relegation decider, on penalties, maximum motivation.
key_picks: Bowen (WHU) - West Ham vs Leeds relegation decider = max motivation and guaranteed minutes on a final day full of dead-rubber rotation
Mateta (CRY, 6.8% owned) - low-owned differential FWD, 0.55 xGI/90, part of a CRY attack triple-up (Muñoz, Lacroix, Sarr) exploiting form and pens
Sarr (CRY, sub-8% owned) - contrarian rank-climber for the finale; Rogers (AVL) held as a cheap differential bench cover
Haaland OMITTED entirely (benched, scores 0); Gabriel avoided (OUT, hamstring); Raya avoided (Arsenal rotating)
